summary: Round 1 (combined Stage A+B). Go gates all green (gofmt/vet clean, 52 tests pass under -race across 5 packages, build OK, --version=0.10.0). Stage A events contract: schema conformance PASS on the real events.jsonl (4/4 lines valid, RFC3339 pinned), single-owner emitter grep PASS (matches REV-001's fix), negative phase:"knowledge" line correctly rejected by the schema (confirms the knowledge->report mapping). CLI vs real repo: all 9 classifications verified by hand against state.md/changelog (all correct incl. 3 ready-to-ship features correctly NOT matched by any changelog members[]/folder-slug), events timeline matches file exactly, `gogo view` verified for glamour stdout, --web plan/report/changelog pages (zero leftover tokens, zero network refs, true compare-mode pairing confirmed on board-actions-and-filter:report), --version matches plugin.json. Hostile/edge fixtures (malformed state.md, garbage+valid mixed events.jsonl, a feature named with spaces/quotes/$(...), legacy root report.md, changelog entry without members[], empty work dir, missing .gogo) all handled gracefully by status/view/events — no panics, no shell injection, sane exit codes (0 degraded / 1 not-found-or-missing-root). Live TUI via tmux: 4 columns + correct counts, navigation, `/` filter + Esc clear, drill-in (only-existing files), glamour plan.md render, events timeline render, issues table render, ASCII flowchart render + source-fallback for sequence, space-guard bounce on non-ready cards, fsnotify live refresh (badge updated within ~2s, incl. a feature folder created mid-session per REV-010's re-arm fix), clean `q` quit (no orphan process) — all PASS. FOUND 2 NEW BLOCKING-CLASS BUGS in the huh form flow (the live keystroke-driven path had never actually been driven to completion by review or the unit suite, only guard logic and launch-argv were tested in isolation): TEST-001 (blocker) — the top-level Bubble Tea Update() only forwards tea.KeyMsg to the form in modeForm, so huh's async NextField/StateCompleted round-trip never arrives back at the form; every launch form (single confirm AND the merged release-name form) can be shown and its default/summary verified, but can never be submitted via Enter/Tab/y — only Ctrl+C (abort) works, so FR5 launches are unreachable live despite the suggested default and injection-safe argv (verified separately via a direct, temporary launch.Launch probe with a stubbed claude) being correct. TEST-002 (major) — cancelling a form doesn't clear the ready-selection, so a later unrelated m/d press silently re-ships the stale selection. Sweep (docs/README/.gitignore/embedded-asset byte-match/12 commands/plugin.json 0.10.0/0.8.0-writer-untouched) all PASS. Route: back to implement with test/issues.json (TEST-001, TEST-002) — both agent-fixable, no user decision needed.
